---
title: 'Julian Treasure: The 4 ways sound affects us | Talk Video | TED.com'
date: '2014-11-04T05:53:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'It''s Author Fun'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1232818515881554814'
blogger_filename: '/2014/11/julian-treasure-4-ways-sound-affects-us.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/It_s Author Fun/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'White Noise'
  - 'Research'
---

<div dir="ltr">
<br /></div>
<div dir="ltr">

</div>
<div class="talk-description" lang="en">
Playing sound effects both pleasant and awful, Julian Treasure shows how
 sound affects us in four significant ways. Listen carefully for a 
shocking fact about noisy open-plan offices.
</div>
<div dir="ltr">
<br /></div>
<div dir="ltr">
<br /></div>
<div dir="ltr">
<a href="http://www.ted.com/talks/julian_treasure_the_4_ways_sound_affects_us?language=en">http://www.ted.com/talks/julian_treasure_the_4_ways_sound_affects_us?language=en</a></div>
<div dir="ltr">
DarrellWolfe.com via Mobile</div>
